summary: The `sql` command opens the store via store.OpenReadOnly (mode=ro) so the SQLite driver rejects direct and CTE-wrapped writes; validateReadOnlySQL now collapses whitespace so 'DELETE\n'/'INSERT\t' cannot bypass the keyword scan.
reason: OpenWithContext gave a read-write handle and the validator's trailing-space keyword scan was bypassable by a newline/tab, allowing a crafted query to mutate the local store (dangerous in MCP/agent mode).
validated_outcome: Newline/tab bypass cases rejected by TestValidateReadOnlySQL; mode=ro blocks writes at the driver level (verified).
